summary: Iteration 29 - Credit System testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified credit indicator, locked tools, AI Image panel with Pro/aspect ratio options, and credit cost display. The credit system is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: PLAN_LIMITS correctly defined for all 4 plans (free, plus, pro, ultra) with correct daily_credits: 20/100/250/1000
CREDIT_COSTS verified: nano_banana=20, nano_banana_pro=50, photo_edit=15, photo_edit_pro=40, judge_basic=25, judge_deep=70
GET /api/usage returns complete credit info: daily_credits, credits_used, credits_remaining, limits, credit_costs
Judge correctly locked for free plan users with informative message
ZETA chat enforces 250 char limit for free plan
AI Image endpoint accepts 'pro' and 'aspect_ratio' parameters
Frontend credit indicator shows remaining credits with Zap icon
Locked tools (layers, signature, watermark, pagecolor, graphic) show Lock icon for free plan
AI Image panel shows Pro toggle, 16:9 aspect ratio, and credit cost (20 kredi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit system fully tested and working. Login: demo@demo.com/demo123. To open editor: Login -> Dashboard -> Click on document card OR New Document -> Create Document. Credit indicator is data-testid='credit-indicator' in editor header showing remaining credits. AI Image tool: data-testid='tool-createimage'. Locked tools for free plan: layers, signature, watermark, pagecolor, graphic - all show Lock icon.

backend_api.GET /api/usage: PASSED - Returns daily_credits, credits_used, credits_remaining, limits, credit_costs
backend_api.free_plan_limits: PASSED - daily_credits=20, judge_enabled=false, zeta_chars=250, nano_pro=false, only 16:9
backend_api.credit_costs: PASSED - All 6 costs correct: nano_banana=20, nano_banana_pro=50, photo_edit=15, photo_edit_pro=40, judge_basic=25, judge_deep=70
backend_api.judge_locked: PASSED - Returns locked=true with upgrade message for free plan
backend_api.zeta_char_limit: PASSED - Returns char_limit_exceeded for messages >250 chars
backend_api.generate_image_params: PASSED - Accepts pro and aspect_ratio parameters

frontend_ui.credit_indicator: PASSED - Shows '0' (remaining credits) with Zap icon in header
frontend_ui.locked_tools: PASSED - All 5 tools (layers, signature, watermark, pagecolor, graphic) show Lock icon
frontend_ui.ai_panel_pro_toggle: PASSED - 'Nano Banana Pro 20 kredi' toggle visible
frontend_ui.ai_panel_credit_info: PASSED - 'Kalan Kredi: 0/20' and 'Yetersiz kredi! Bu işlem 20 kredi gerektirir.' visible
